NONINVSV_VNTLTR_DSCHRG_CD O0110G1C Therapies: Non-Invas Mechanical Ventilator (Disch) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received a noninvasive mechanical ventilator in the last three days of their SNF stay. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
988 BILVL_PSTV_ARWY_PRSR_ADMSN_CD BILVL_PSTV_ARWY_PRSR_ADMSN_CD O0110G2A Therapies: BiPAP (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received a BiPAP ventilator days one through three (on admission) of
